metadata.description: Collection of plugins, agents, prompts, and skills for AI agents.

plugins.name: meta-prompts
plugins.description: Skills for creating, reviewing, and rewriting agent prompts — including agent/plugin file authoring, SKILL.md design, and PROSE methodology guidance.

plugins.name: agents-creator
plugins.description: Create, review, rewrite, and debug repository-specific agents.md, .github/agents/*.md, and *.agent.md files.

plugins.name: plugin-creator
plugins.description: Create and maintain GitHub Copilot CLI and Claude Code plugins and marketplaces, including plugin.json and marketplace.json manifests for both platforms.

plugins.name: prose-guide
plugins.description: Guide AI-native development with the PROSE methodology, including context engineering, agent primitives, and spec-driven workflows.

plugins.name: dotnet
plugins.description: Skills for .NET development, including Aspire distributed-app orchestration, debugging, and documentation.

plugins.name: aspire-dev
plugins.description: Guide .NET Aspire development, including AppHost setup, integrations, runtime operations, debugging, logs, and distributed traces.

plugins.name: rpi-workflow
plugins.description: Agents for RPI workflow — orchestrator, planner, researcher, implementor, and reviewer — using VS Code memory to manage workflow tasks.

plugins.name: skill-guide
plugins.description: Design, write, review, and improve SKILL.md files using proven patterns (Tool Wrapper, Generator, Reviewer, Inversion, Pipeline) with intent-based protocols for creating, reviewing, and improving agent skills.
